initialize.title: Initialize TFactory
initialize.description: This project doesn't have TFactory initialized. Would you like to set it up now?
initialize.createFolder: Create a .tfactory folder in your project
initialize.setupSpecs: Set up the specs directory for your tasks
initialize.sourcePathNotConfiguredDescription: Please set the TFactory source path in App Settings before initializing.
initialize.initFailedDescription: Failed to initialize TFactory. Please try again.

gitSetup.title: Git Repository Required
gitSetup.description: TFactory uses git to safely build features in isolated workspaces
gitSetup.notGitRepo: This folder is not a git repository
gitSetup.needsInit: Git needs to be initialized before TFactory can manage your code.
gitSetup.needsCommit: At least one commit is required for TFactory to create worktrees.
gitSetup.willSetup: We'll set up git for you:
gitSetup.createCommit: Create an initial commit with your current files
gitSetup.initializingRepo: Initializing git repository and creating initial commit...
gitSetup.readyToUse: Your project is now ready to use with TFactory!

githubSetup.connectDescription: TFactory requires GitHub to manage your code branches and keep tasks up to date.
githubSetup.claudeDescription: TFactory uses Claude AI for intelligent features like Task automation and code analysis.
githubSetup.repoDescription: TFactory will use this repository for managing task branches and keeping your code up to date.
githubSetup.branchDescription: Choose which branch TFactory should use as the base for creating task branches.
githubSetup.branchExplanation: TFactory creates isolated workspaces for each task. Selecting the right base branch ensures your tasks start with the latest code from your main development line.
githubSetup.ready: TFactory is ready to use! You can now create tasks that will be automatically based on the {{branchName}} branch.

worktrees.title: Worktrees
worktrees.description: Manage isolated workspaces for your TFactory tasks
worktrees.emptyDescription: Worktrees are created automatically when TFactory builds features. They provide isolated workspaces for each task.
worktrees.mergeDescription: Merge changes from this worktree into the base branch.
worktrees.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete the worktree and all uncommitted changes. This action cannot be undone.

addProject.title: Add Project
addProject.description: Choose how you'd like to add a project
addProject.gitUrlHelp: Portal clones into the workspace root (~/.tfactory/workspaces/ on laptop, the PVC on K8s).
addProject.openExistingDescription: Browse to an existing project on your computer
addProject.createNewDescription: Start fresh with a new project folder
addProject.createNewSubtitle: Set up a new project folder
addProject.projectNameHelp: This will be the folder name. Use lowercase with hyphens.

customModel.title: Custom Model Configuration
customModel.description: Configure the model and thinking level for this chat session.
customModel.thinkingLevelHint: Thinking level is only available for Claude

removeProject.title: Remove Project?
removeProject.description: This will remove "{{projectName}}" from the app. Your files will be preserved on disk and you can re-add the project later.
